package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for ecb_mode_cipher: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: direct use of `cipher.Block.Encrypt` / `cipher.Block.Decrypt` without a block mode wrapper (CBC, CTR, GCM)
type CaseEcbModeCipherDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseEcbModeCipherModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseEcbModeCipherRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseEcbModeCipherModel
}

type CaseEcbModeCipherService struct {
    repo *CaseEcbModeCipherRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseEcbModeCipherAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeEcbModeCipher(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseEcbModeCipherDTO) error {
    focus := "ecb_mode_cipher"
    _ = focus
    ecb_mode_cipher_negative := map[string]int{"ecb": 1, "mode": 2, "cipher": 3}
    ecb_mode_cipher_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    ecb_negative_0 := ecb_mode_cipher_negative["ecb"] + len(input)
    _ = ecb_negative_0
    mode_negative_1 := ecb_mode_cipher_negative["mode"] + len(input)
    _ = mode_negative_1
    cipher_negative_2 := ecb_mode_cipher_negative["cipher"] + len(input)
    _ = cipher_negative_2
    return nil
}
